title: Welcome to Delhi
description: You have just landed in Delhi, India. The air is warm, the airport is bustling. It's time to speak your first Hindi word.
keyPoints: We will start with just ONE word.

paragraphs.hindi: You step outside the airport. A taxi driver waves at you.
paragraphs.translation: You step outside the airport. A taxi driver waves at you.

question_en: What did the taxi driver say?
question_vi: Người lái xe taxi đã nói gì?

title: The Golden Rule of Hindi
explanation: In Hindi, you can use one word for both 'Hello' and 'Goodbye'. It is polite, respectful, and universally understood across India.

memoryTrick: Na-mas-te. Put your hands together when you say it!
